summary: All requested features verified. Landing page correctly removed 'Rent Collector' video and 'Custom branding' from Pro tier. Standard tier shows 'Rent payment tracking' and Pro tier shows 'AI-Powered Insights Dashboard'. Mobile bottom navigation appears correctly at 375px viewport. Maintenance page 'Message Contractor' button works when contractor is assigned. Contractor messaging API endpoints all functional. PWA manifest.json has shortcuts for Dashboard and Maintenance.
passed_tests: Backend: Manager login works (test@test.com/test123)
Backend: Contractor login works (testcontractor@test.com/test123)
Backend: GET /api/maintenance-requests/{id}/messages returns 200
Backend: POST /api/maintenance-requests/{id}/messages sends message successfully
Backend: Contractor can get job messages via /api/contractor/jobs/{id}/messages
Backend: PWA manifest.json accessible
Backend: PWA manifest has required PWA fields (name, short_name, icons, display, start_url)
Backend: PWA manifest has shortcuts array with Dashboard and Maintenance
Code: Landing.js does NOT contain 'Custom branding' in pricing display
Code: Landing.js does NOT contain 'Rent Collector' video
Code: Landing.js contains 'Rent payment tracking' in Standard tier
Code: Landing.js contains 'AI-Powered Insights Dashboard' in Pro tier
Code: MobileNav.js exists with data-testid attributes
Code: Layout.js imports and uses MobileNav component
Frontend: Landing page pricing shows correct features per tier
Frontend: Mobile nav (375px viewport) shows Home, Properties, Maintenance, Tenants, Menu items
Frontend: All mobile nav items visible and clickable
Frontend: Maintenance page loads with test request 'Leaky faucet in kitchen'
Frontend: Request edit dialog shows contractor 'John Plumber' as Assigned
Frontend: 'Message John Plumber' button visible in dialog
Frontend: Message dialog opens with input field and send button
Frontend: Messaging conversation shows previous messages
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement recommended

mocked_apis.tenant_screening: Uses simulated API - not a real screening provider

context_for_next_testing_agent: All recent changes verified working correctly. Contractor-Manager messaging is fully functional via /api/maintenance-requests/{id}/messages endpoints. Mobile bottom navigation appears at viewports below 1024px (lg:hidden class). PWA manifest.json includes shortcuts for Dashboard and Maintenance. The test maintenance request 'Leaky faucet in kitchen' (ID: 4a2e3b39-abd6-4209-9776-ce5bc2ff8662) is assigned to contractor 'John Plumber' and can be used for testing messaging features.
